question_text: The corners and mid-points of the sides of a triangle are named using the distinct letters P, Q, R, S, T and U, but not necessarily in the same order. Consider the following statements: The line joining P and R is parallel to the line joining Q and S. P is placed on the side opposite to the corner T. S and U cannot be placed on the same side. Which one of the following statements is correct based on the above information?

options.A: P cannot be placed at a corner
options.B: S cannot be placed at a corner
options.C: U cannot be placed at a mid-point (d) R cannot be placed at a corner
